templates.status_update: Hi! Quick status: this still applies cleanly to the latest main as of today, and the CI/mergeable state is {state}. Re-requesting a review — happy to update for any feedback, and just as happy to close if the repo has moved on.
templates.chase_with_change: Pushed a small update — {summary}. Re-requesting review. If this is no longer a priority, no problem at all, just say the word and I'll close.
templates.close_stale: Closing — no maintainer activity for {days} days and the repo has moved on. Happy to reopen if the fix is still wanted.
templates.close_archived: Closing — repo is archived upstream; fix is no longer needed.
templates.respond_to_conflict: Rebased on latest main. {conflicts} conflict(s) — all addressed, CI re-running.
